variables.notes: Conservative output is empty to avoid double counting. 'Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' looks embedded in the selected parent 'General and administrative expenses'. For R&D, the excerpt shows a dedicated 'Research and development expenses' row above operating loss and a separate 'Depreciation in Research & Development Expenses' component beneath it. The provided prior-mapping notes suggest R&D may already be handled through both XSGA_COMPONENTS logic and XRD, but the displayed XSGA_COMPONENTS final_choice list is inconsistent with that note, so manual review is warranted before separately adding any R&D D&A.
